Colour dispensing · Floor tool

Batch Calculator

Dose colorants against a base paint, verify the colourant load, and print a dispensing ticket. Saved formulas persist to the store database.

Station

STN-01 · Dispensing

—

01 · Base paint
02 · Colourant additions

Rates are millilitres of colorant per litre of finished batch.

03 · Batch size

1 litre = 1,000 ml

Unit

Results update on demand

No batch calculated yet

Select a base paint, add colourant rates and set the batch size, then choose “Calculate batch” to produce a dispensing report.

Formula library

Save current mix

Stores the base, colourant rows and notes in the formula library.

MixStation Pro v1.0.0 · Internal dispensing tool

Telemetry simulated to console · No customer data collected
